Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
221 
REV_CNTR_CHRG_AMT 
LABEL: 
Revenue Center Charge Amount 
DESCRIPTION: The total charge for the revenue center code for the billing period. Total charges include both covered 
and non-covered charges (as defined by UB-04 Billing Manual) 
SHORT NAME: REV_CNTR_CHRG_AMT 
LONG NAME: REV_CNTR_CHRG_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
IP line
